response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks demonstrable production-scale experience with multi-agent AI in regulated fintech environments, has no explicit track record scaling engineering teams to 30+, and shows minimal evidence of financial infrastructure or compliance-aware AI system design.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven expertise in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang high-throughput apps)
Strong engineering culture advocacy (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source leadership)
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in live fintech or regulated financial contexts
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal mention of real-time credit risk, working capital, or compliance infrastructure — core to the role
